old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-fne5","title":"Resolve duplicate gateway CoAP ownership","description":"Final production builds for nucleo_wl55jc and r1_neo/nrf52840 fail because legacy coap_server.c and modular coap_config.c both define lichen_config, while only the modular lichen_coap iterable section has linker bounds. Inputs are inherited from origin/main and selected commits 1dbe31a7, 8b82d8ee, and a12bbcde. Resolve by ensuring gateway configurations use one CoAP resource/service owner; do not merely rename duplicate /config resources or add a second conflicting service.","acceptance_criteria":"Native gateway, nucleo_wl55jc gateway, and r1_neo/nrf52840 meshtastic gateway link successfully with exactly one /config owner and no undefined CoAP iterable-section bounds; focused CoAP/Twister tests pass.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-21T04:41:53.44084709Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-21T04:41:53.44084709Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-fne5","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-7fqg.3","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-21T04:41:53.525307502Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Fixed duplicate CoAP ownership with Kconfig depends and updated CMake/comments for modular lichen_coap preference, linker sections, and single /config owner. Gateway native_sim build and Twister clean. No resource renames.
